fields.name: HIPASS
fields.description: HIPASS source name (based on J2000 position)

fields.name: RA
fields.description: Right Ascension J2000 (RAh:RAm:RAs)

fields.name: DE
fields.description: Declination J2000 (DEd:DEm:DEs with sign)

fields.name: RV50max
fields.description: Radial velocity at centre of profile clipped at 50% peak flux density (width maximised)

fields.name: RV50min
fields.description: Radial velocity at centre of profile clipped at 50% peak flux density (width minimised)

fields.name: RV20max
fields.description: Radial velocity at centre of profile clipped at 20% peak flux density (width maximised)

fields.name: RV20min
fields.description: Radial velocity at centre of profile clipped at 20% peak flux density (width minimised)

fields.name: RVmom
fields.description: Flux-weighted mean velocity of profile clipped at RVlo and RVhi

fields.name: RVsp
fields.description: Radial velocity of profile peak

fields.name: RVGSR
fields.description: RV50max expressed in Galactic Standard of Rest frame

fields.name: RVLG
fields.description: RV50max expressed in Local Group frame

fields.name: RVCMB
fields.description: RV50max expressed in Cosmic Microwave Background frame

fields.name: RV1
fields.description: Lower radial velocity bound on profile (manually specified)

fields.name: RV2
fields.description: Upper radial velocity bound on profile (manually specified)

fields.name: RVsp1
fields.description: Lower radial velocity for spectral plots and RMS (manually specified)

fields.name: RVsp2
fields.description: Upper radial velocity for spectral plots and RMS (manually specified)

fields.name: RVmask
fields.description: Masked radial velocity range for baseline fit (manually specified)

fields.name: W50max
fields.description: Width of line profile clipped at 50% peak flux density (width maximised)

fields.name: W50min
fields.description: Width of line profile clipped at 50% peak flux density (width minimised)

fields.name: W20max
fields.description: Width of line profile clipped at 20% peak flux density (width maximised)

fields.name: W20min
fields.description: Width of line profile clipped at 20% peak flux density (width minimised)

fields.name: Speak
fields.description: Peak line profile flux density

fields.name: Sint
fields.description: Integrated flux of line profile clipped at RV1 and RV2

fields.name: RMS
fields.description: RMS of masked spectrum between RVsp1 and RVsp2

fields.name: RMSclip
fields.description: Clipped RMS of masked spectrum between RVsp1 and RVsp2

fields.name: RMScube
fields.description: RMS of unsmoothed cube (median absolute deviation from the median multiplied by sqrt(pi/2))

fields.name: cube
fields.description: Cube number

fields.name: Sigma
fields.description: Standard deviation of Gaussian used in baseline smoothing

fields.name: Boxsize
fields.description: Sidelength of boxsize used for parameter measurement

fields.name: Qual
fields.description: Quality comment: 1 = real, 2 = have concerns

fields.name: nb
fields.description: Narrowband follow-up status flag: 1 = real

fields.name: cf
fields.description: Confused source flag: 1 = confused

fields.name: ext
fields.description: Extended source flag: 1 = extended
